title: PRESCHOOL - 211info
text: GRANTS PASS SCHOOL DISTRICT 7 PRESCHOOL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a preschool program that builds children's language, literacy, fine motor, math and reasoning skills through songs, movement, science experiments, play, and creative hands-on experiences. Preschoolers are selected through a lottery system and families may be prioritized based on needs. 725 North East Dean Drive Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Ages 4-5 Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 474-5709 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 474-5709 Annie Blnachard Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income, proof of address LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Josephine County Services: Child Care Expense Assistance * Preschool Age Children Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - READY FOR KINDERGARTEN INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING WORKSHOPS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - PARENT AND CHILD PLAYGROUPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
